name: cope-rope
paperTitle: CoPE: Clipped RoPE as A Scalable Free Lunch for Long Context LLMs
content:
## Introduction

RoPE frequencies above a threshold are clipped, reducing aliasing and enabling longer context without retraining. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

RoPE frequencies above a threshold are clipped, reducing aliasing and enabling longer context without retraining.
